title: exceljs parse file error: Uncaught (in promise) TypeError: Cannot read property 'company' of undefined
author: i365
body:
error:
Uncaught (in promise) TypeError: Cannot read property 'company' of undefined

test case file:
[xlsx file](https://github.com/i365/static/raw/master/test/test-parse.xlsx)

it test in browser.

comments.author: zhongsink
comments.body:
i have the same problem, it is same as [865](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/issues/865#issue-457234981)
did you found the solution?

comments.author: Alanscut
TranBaVinhSon
comments.body: Tried latest version (`4.1.1`) but without success, any solution?

comments.author: Kannnnng
comments.body: I found a temporary method available. Open this file with Excel, and then do nothing, just perform a save operation, and use it later, there will be no error.

comments.author: shaozj
comments.body: Any solution? I have the same problem.

comments.author: Simone-cogno
comments.body: Did someone find a workaround? I'm unable to open excel files and I cannot use the solution of @Kannnnng because I have a hundred of them...

comments.author: Kannnnng
comments.body: 您好，我已收到您的来信，并会尽快答复，祝好。闫守康

comments.author: OtavioCleyderman
comments.body: Hi, i'm also going through the same problem. But, it would not be viable in my case to open and close the file. Would anyone have another solution? Any way to not need to have this validation?
